scripts.build: bun install --frozen-lockfile && bunx turbo run build
scripts.predev: lsof -ti:3001,5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f 'bun --watch src/index.ts' 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.dev:localhost: bun run dev:backend & bun run dev:frontend
scripts.dev:portless: bun run dev:portless:backend & bun run dev:portless:frontend
scripts.test:app: bunx turbo run build --filter=@listen/client... && bun run --cwd test app:smoke
scripts.test:hooks:e2e: bunx turbo run build --filter=@listen/core --filter=@listen/server --filter=@listen/client --filter=listen-backend --filter=listen-frontend && bun run --cwd test hooks:e2e
scripts.deploy:frontend: bun run build --filter=listen-frontend && CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=9959301f03d2db1a5fcf5e004278d467 bunx wrangler pages deploy
scripts.deploy:backend:phala: phala deploy --cvm-id 5b6391f2-9e81-4331-baa7-162a5d9838da -c docker-compose.phala.yml -e .env.prod -e LISTEN_BACKEND_IMAGE=${LISTEN_BACKEND_IMAGE:-ghcr.io/tinycloudlabs/listen-backend:latest} -e LISTEN_INGRESS_IMAGE=${LISTEN_INGRESS_IMAGE:-ghcr.io/tinycloudlabs/listen-backend:ingress-latest} -e TINYCLOUD_HOST=${TINYCLOUD_HOST:-https://tee.node.tinycloud.xyz} -e PORT=3001 -e PHALA_GATEWAY_CNAME=${PHALA_GATEWAY_CNAME:-_.dstack-pha-prod5.phala.network} --wait && curl -fsS https://api.listen.tinycloud.xyz/healthz && curl -fsS https://api.listen.tinycloud.xyz/api/server-info
